highlights: Income amounts are now masked by default — tap any ₹•••••• to reveal with your PIN, or use the 👁️ button to show/hide all at once.
Masking resets automatically when you lock the app or switch away.
Fixed: income entries on the Home screen can now be swiped left to delete, just like expenses.
Fixed: the filter sheet now hides Payment Method, Group, and Split options when filtering by Income (they don't apply to income entries).
Filter transactions by group directly from the List tab — including a 'No group' option for untagged expenses.
Fixed biometric unlock not triggering after switching away from the app and coming back.
Budgets now warn you if you're on pace to go over your monthly limit, before it actually happens.
New budgets suggest a starting amount based on your last 3 months of spending.
A reminder shows up on Home if you haven't backed up your data in a while — tap it to back up instantly.
New "How this app works" guide in Settings, explaining every tab and feature.

sections.title: Home — Overview
sections.body: Your at-a-glance view of the month. See how much money came in, went out, and what's left over, plus your most recent expenses and a quick breakdown of what you've spent on by category.

sections.title: Home — Warranties
sections.body: Tracks warranty coverage for things you've bought — phones, appliances, anything with a guarantee period. Mark an expense as "under warranty" when you add it, and this tab shows what's still covered and what's about to run out.

sections.title: Home — Forecast
sections.body: A look ahead at what you're likely to spend for the rest of the month (or the next 30 days), based on what's already gone out, what's due to repeat, and your typical day-to-day spending.

sections.title: Home — Budgets
sections.body: Set a monthly spending limit — either overall or for a specific category — and track how close you are to it. You'll also see whether you're on pace to stay under or go over, based on how fast you're spending so far this month.

sections.title: Transactions
sections.body: Every expense and income entry you've ever logged, grouped by date. Search, filter by category, payment method, date, or amount, and tap any entry to edit or delete it.

sections.title: Insights
sections.body: Dig into your spending patterns — by category, by payment method, or by comparing one period to another, like this week vs last week, or this month vs last month.

sections.title: Settings
sections.body: Manage categories, payment methods, and groups; set up recurring expenses; back up or restore your data; and control your PIN and biometric unlock.

sections.title: Split expenses
sections.body: When you split a bill with someone, log the full amount and how many ways it's split — the app works out your share automatically, and that share is what counts toward your budgets and totals. Mark it as settled once everyone's paid up.

sections.title: Recurring expenses
sections.body: For things that repeat — rent, subscriptions, EMIs — set it up once and the app logs it automatically going forward (weekly, monthly, or yearly), so you don't have to re-enter it every time.
